title: There Once was an Island: Te Henua e Nnoho
original_title: There Once was an Island: Te Henua e Nnoho
overview: Three people in a unique Pacific Island community face the first devastating effects of climate change, including a terrifying flood. Will they decide to stay with their island home or move to a new and unfamiliar land, leaving their culture and language behind forever?
